samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0428]: the name `main` is defined multiple times
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/rel_op_c4/sample_001/target.rs:30:1
   |
 1 | fn main() -> Result<(), i32> {
   | ---------------------------- previous definition of the value `main` here
...
30 | fn main() {
   | ^^^^^^^^^ `main` redefined here
   |
   = note: `main` must be defined only once in the value namespace of this module

error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/rel_op_c4/sample_001/target.rs:8:24
  |
8 |     let px_end: &i32 = &x + 1;
  |                 ----   ^^^^^^ expected `&i32`, found `i32`
  |                 |
  |                 expected due to this
  |
help: consider borrowing here
  |
8 |     let px_end: &i32 = &(&x + 1);
  |                        ++      +

error[E0308]: mismatched types
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/rel_op_c4/sample_001/target.rs:9:24
  |
9 |     let py_end: &i32 = &y + 1;
  |                 ----   ^^^^^^ expected `&i32`, found `i32`
  |                 |
  |                 expected due to this
  |
help: consider borrowing here
  |
9 |     let py_end: &i32 = &(&y + 1);
  |                        ++      +

error[E0277]: can't compare `&i32` with `i32`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/rel_op_c4/sample_001/target.rs:19:15
   |
19 |     if px_end != (&x + 1) {
   |               ^^ no implementation for `&i32 == i32`
   |
   = help: the trait `PartialEq<i32>` is not implemented for `&i32`
help: consider dereferencing here
   |
19 |     if *px_end != (&x + 1) {
   |        +
